title: helmia anomala
intro: Helmia anomala, also known as the "New Zealand fern tree," is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, which is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helmia anomala include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues. Helmia anomala can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
